name: T S Flour Mill Public Company Limited
summary: T S Flour Mill Public Company Limited produces and distributes wheat flour in Thailand. The company also trades in, imports, and exports wheat, wheat products, and other grains. Its products are used in various bakery and food products, such as bread, noodles, instant noodles, pizza, donut, biscuit, steamed bun, deep-fried stick dough, flat bread, biscuit sponge cake, and cake. The company was formerly known as Thai Sugar Inter Trade Company Limited and changed its name to T S Flour Mill Public Company Limited in 2005. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Phra Pradaeng, Thailand. T S Flour Mill Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Thai Sugar Terminal Public Co., Ltd.
